title: Lo Shu Enigma (洛書)
welcome_subtitle: The Scroll of Luo River: Cosmic Order & Feng Shui.
steps: 🌊 Anciently, the Luo River (洛) flooded, destroying the crops of China.
👑 Emperor Yu the Great sought to tame the waters with wisdom and canals.
🐢 From the river rose a turtle with the 'Luo Shu' (洛書) etched on its shell.
📜 'Luo' (洛) is the sacred river; 'Shu' (书) means 'Book' or 'Divine Script'.
✨ Those marks became the foundation of Feng Shui (風水) and astrology.
🧩 The square represents the universe in motion and the Wu Xing (五行) balance.
🧧 Solve the enigma to harmonize the cosmic energies!
game_instructions: Arrange numbers (1-9) so every line sums to 15.
win_message: Balance restored! You have honored the Script of the Luo River.
